forgotPage.heading: Reset your password
forgotPage.lead: Enter your account email. If it matches an account with a password, you will receive a reset link.

resetPage.heading: Choose a new password
resetPage.lead: Enter the new password for your account.
resetPage.setupLead: Welcome! Choose a password to activate your account.
resetPage.missingToken: This reset link is invalid or incomplete. Request a new link from the forgot-password page.

forgotForm.successNeutral: If an account exists for this address, you will receive an email with a reset link shortly.
